history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian woman with shoulder-length dark hair and bangs is taking a selfie inside a car. She is wearing a navy blue t-shirt with a colorful cartoon print on the front. Her skin is fair, and she has large, dark eyes and pink lips. The lighting is natural, coming from the side, casting soft shadows on her face and highlighting her features. The background is slightly blurred, showing the interior of the car with a window on the left revealing a bright, outdoor scene with trees and buildings. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, with a hint of playfulness. The color palette is dominated by the dark blue of her shirt, the natural skin tones, and the muted greens and yellows of the outdoor background.
